title: campanula spatulata
intro: Campanula spatulata, also known as the Spatulate Bellflower, is a perennial flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The roots of Campanula spatulata have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including the ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots of Campanula spatulata are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
